end_market_segment_exposure.research_read: EDA/IP is a leading indicator for future tape-outs; AI ASIC and advanced-node design complexity are the highest-signal angles.
Core AI compute value pool; test whether revenue durability, software ecosystem and supply allocation justify valuation.
Mostly consumer/device cycle, with edge AI and auto connectivity optionality; separate sell-through from restock.
Data movement is the second-order AI value pool after accelerators/HBM; watch port-speed and architecture shifts.
Cycle and quality diverge sharply by end market; AI power is additive but industrial/auto inventory still matters.
HBM is structural, but DRAM/NAND remain cyclical; use separate HBM and commodity memory supply-demand bridges.
Manufacturing layer links every demand bucket; advanced nodes and mature-node localization have different valuation anchors.
Capital equipment sees demand through customer capex; order quality and China pull-forward are the central issues.
Complexity lever: advanced nodes, HBM, chiplets and packaging raise test/metrology intensity.
Materials are utilization and qualification stories; advanced-node intensity and local qualification matter more than headline capex.
Advanced packaging is a bottleneck, but benefits concentrate in qualified capacity, equipment and materials.
AI rack complexity drives layer count, substrate demand and low-loss material; monitor ASP erosion versus mix.
800G/1.6T is high beta to AI cluster scale-out; margins depend on customer awards, laser yield and ASP curve.
System integration converts component shortages into revenue, but pass-through economics and working capital are decisive.
Power, cooling, connectors and fab services are where semiconductor demand meets physical infrastructure constraints.
Inventory-cycle and mix-upgrade layer; high-end server/auto components can diverge from commodity consumer parts.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: AI ASIC and chiplet design starts accelerate; RPO conversion and IP royalty mix expand.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Advanced-node complexity supports steady growth, but large-deal timing creates quarterly noise.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Design starts slow as AI ROI is questioned or large customers internalize more tooling/IP.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: RPO, design-start commentary, emulation demand, IP royalty growth.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: AI training/inference demand broadens; supply constraints remain favorable and software/platform attach holds margins.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: AI demand remains strong but customer concentration and supply bottlenecks cap upside visibility.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Hyperscaler ROI slows, custom ASIC pressure rises, or HBM/CoWoS constraints shift from scarcity to overbuild.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Cloud capex revisions, backlog, HBM allocation, datacenter GM, product cadence.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Premium handset refresh, edge AI content and RF integration lift content per device.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Inventory normalizes slowly and content gains offset muted unit growth.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Android/iPhone units disappoint, customer insourcing rises or China price competition compresses ASP.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Handset sell-through, build plans, RF module pricing, channel inventory.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Ethernet scale-out and 800G/1.6T upgrades raise switch, DSP, retimer and SerDes content.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: AI networking grows but architecture/customer timing creates lumpy ramps.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Cluster architecture changes reduce external content or customer awards concentrate away from public suppliers.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Port-speed roadmap, hyperscaler awards, optical DSP share, retimer attach.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Industrial/auto destocking ends and AI server power becomes a material incremental driver.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Recovery is uneven by product line; utilization improves gradually.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Distributor restock fades, EV growth slows or SiC/power pricing worsens.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Book-to-bill, distributor inventory, industrial PMI, EV inverter demand.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: HBM tightness and disciplined capex lift both mix and commodity memory pricing.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: HBM remains strong while DRAM/NAND cycles recover at different speeds.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: HBM capacity additions and commodity capex create a new supply glut.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: HBM qualification, contract ASP, inventory days, memory capex.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Advanced-node demand and CoWoS capacity sustain pricing/utilization while mature nodes recover.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Advanced and mature nodes diverge; depreciation and capex ROI remain key debates.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Mature-node overcapacity worsens and advanced-node customer concentration creates pricing pressure.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Utilization, wafer ASP, node mix, capex, customer tape-outs.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: AI/HBM/leading-edge capex creates a multi-year WFE upcycle with service mix support.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Orders improve but China pull-forward and memory catch-up create uneven quality.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Backlog rolls over after export-control pull-forward or memory capex pauses.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Orders, backlog, book-to-bill, China mix, customer capex.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: HBM, advanced packaging and 2nm complexity raise test/metrology intensity faster than WFE.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: AI/HBM helps but platform timing and customer qualification remain lumpy.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: OSAT/memory capex pauses or new tester/probe platforms miss customer ramps.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Test time, probe ASP, ATE platform adoption, OSAT capex.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Wafer starts recover and advanced-node material intensity/qualification wins lift mix.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Utilization recovery is gradual while advanced materials outperform commodity inputs.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Fab utilization disappoints or localization competition erodes pricing/margins.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Wafer shipments, fab utilization, qualification wins, gas/chemical pricing.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Advanced packaging remains a binding AI bottleneck with pricing power and customer pre-commitments.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Advanced packaging grows but traditional OSAT remains cyclical and lower margin.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Capacity normalizes faster than expected or value capture stays captive inside foundry/GPU platforms.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: CoWoS/HBM stack capacity, OSAT utilization, substrate lead time, packaging capex.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: AI rack layer count, ABF demand and low-loss material mix drive durable content growth.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: AI PCB/substrate outgrows consumer but ASP erosion offsets part of unit/mix gains.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Capacity additions and customer bargaining compress margins despite higher shipments.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Layer count, ABF utilization, AI server mix, low-loss material share.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: 800G/1.6T adoption and laser/component scarcity keep revenue and margins ahead of ASP erosion.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Units grow strongly but pricing declines require careful margin underwriting.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Module ASP erosion outruns unit growth or customer awards shift unexpectedly.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: 800G/1.6T awards, ASP curve, laser yield, hyperscaler concentration.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Rack-scale AI systems lift ODM engineering value and backlog converts to cash.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Revenue grows but margins remain constrained by pass-through hardware and working capital.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Customer timing slips, inventory builds or AI server mix dilutes cash conversion.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: AI server monthly revenue, backlog, working capital, gross margin.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Power/cooling/connectors become durable AI infrastructure bottlenecks with backlog and attach-rate growth.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Data-center projects support growth but project mix keeps margin outcomes uneven.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Backlog converts poorly, project timing slips or cost inflation erodes margins.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Power density, liquid-cooling attach, backlog conversion, project margin.

segment_scenario_variables.bull_case: Distributor inventory bottoms and high-end auto/server component mix improves pricing and utilization.
segment_scenario_variables.base_case: Inventory correction fades gradually with uneven pricing by product line.
segment_scenario_variables.bear_case: Restock proves temporary and commodity pricing remains weak.
segment_scenario_variables.watch_first: Distributor inventory, component pricing, utilization, auto/server mix.

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 设计启动和先进节点复杂度是否仍在推高 EDA/IP wallet share？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: RPO/ARR; design starts; emulation/prototyping demand; IP royalty; advanced-node tape-out wins
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 公司订单/RPO披露、foundry PDK/节点节奏、客户 tape-out commentary、CIQ segment revenue
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 季度为主，重大客户/节点事件临时更新
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 收入模型用 subscription + IP royalty + design-service milestone；估值看 recurring growth 和 RPO 转化。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: EDA 是长周期续费业务，不要把单季 license timing 误读成结构性加速或减速。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: AI accelerator / ASIC 收入可见度是否足以支撑当前估值和毛利？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: hyperscaler capex; GPU/ASIC backlog; HBM attach; CoWoS allocation; datacenter GM; product cadence
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: hyperscaler capex、vendor backlog/commentary、TSMC HPC mix、HBM supply agreement、CIQ consensus revisions
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度 capex/供应链跟踪 + 季度财报更新
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 拆 accelerator unit、ASP、HBM/package constraint、networking/software attach 和 customer concentration。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 不要只看 GPU revenue；需要验证 power、network、HBM、package 是否同步支持出货。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 消费电子库存去化和高端机 mix 是否真正改善内容量和 ASP？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: handset sell-through; Android channel inventory; Apple build plan; RF content; Wi-Fi/Bluetooth attach; DDI/CIS pricing
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 手机供应链月度收入、渠道库存、客户新品 BOM、公司 design-win commentary、CIQ segment/geography split
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度供应链 + 季度公司更新
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 把 handset beta、RF content、CIS/DDI、connectivity 分开建模，不用一个消费电子倍数套所有公司。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: restocking 与 sell-through recovery 需要区分；低端 Android 补库存不等于高质量复苏。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: AI scale-out 网络升级是否把价值留在 switch/SerDes/DSP/retimer？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: switch port speed mix; retimer attach; optical DSP ASP; Ethernet vs InfiniBand share; AI cluster topology
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: cloud networking capex、Arista/NVIDIA/Broadcom/Marvell commentary、optical award、CIQ consensus revisions
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度供应链信号 + 季度财报
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 按 port speed、radix、retimer/DSP attach 和 ASIC/custom silicon pipeline 拆收入。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: AI server 出货和网络芯片出货存在节奏差；需要用 cluster architecture 校验拉货质量。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 工业/汽车去库存是否结束，AI power 是否足以抵消传统周期？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: book-to-bill; distributor inventory; auto production; EV inverter demand; SiC utilization; AI server power content
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 分销商库存、公司 backlog/order commentary、汽车产量、工业 PMI、CIQ margin/segment estimates
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度宏观/渠道 + 季度财报
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 把 long-cycle auto/industrial、consumer analog、AI power、SiC/GaN 分开建收入和毛利。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 模拟公司利润弹性经常来自 utilization 而非单纯收入增速；周期底部要看库存质量。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: HBM 结构性 mix 改善是否能穿越 DRAM/NAND 周期？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: DRAM/NAND contract ASP; bit shipment; inventory days; HBM qualification/share; memory capex; enterprise SSD demand
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: memory pricing tracker、公司 capex/ASP commentary、HBM qualification news、CIQ consensus/margin revisions
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度价格/库存 + 季度公司更新
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 用 ASP、bit growth、capex discipline、HBM mix 和 utilization 做 normalized earnings，而非年化峰值 EPS。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: HBM 紧缺可能掩盖 commodity DRAM/NAND 供给；要单独看 HBM 与非 HBM 的供需。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 先进制程和成熟制程的稼动率/定价是否分化？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: utilization; wafer ASP; node mix; capex/depreciation; advanced-node share; customer concentration; geopolitics
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: foundry 月度收入、公司法说、客户 tape-out、capex guidance、CIQ segment/geography data
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度收入 + 季度稼动率/节点 mix
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 先进 foundry 看 node leadership 和 HPC mix；成熟 foundry 看 utilization recovery、P/B 和政策产能。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 成熟制程本地化可能同时带来份额提升和价格压力，不能只看产能扩张。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: WFE 订单是 AI/HBM 多年上行，还是 China pull-forward / memory catch-up？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: WFE TAM; orders/backlog; book-to-bill; service revenue; China mix; memory vs logic capex; export-control impact
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: SEMI/WFE 数据、公司 backlog、客户 capex、出口管制更新、CIQ order/revenue revisions
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度行业数据 + 季度订单/收入
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 按 process step、客户、China exposure、service mix 和 backlog quality 建 wallet-share 模型。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 设备收入滞后订单；高 China mix 可能是拉动也可能是未来回落风险。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 先进制程、HBM 和 advanced packaging 是否提高 metrology/ATE/probe 价值量？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: test time; probe-card ASP; ATE platform adoption; inspection intensity; OSAT capex; AI/HBM product ramps
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: KLA/Advantest/Teradyne/Technoprobe commentary、OSAT capex、HBM stack/test bottleneck、CIQ margins
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 季度为主，AI/HBM ramp 事件临时更新
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 把 capital equipment 与 probe/socket consumables 分开；AI/HBM test time 用单独 driver。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: ATE/probe 的周期不像 WFE 完全同步；新平台 timing 与客户 qualification 很关键。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 晶圆开工率和先进材料用量是否足以带动耗材 ASP/mix？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: wafer starts; wafer shipment; fab utilization; specialty gas pricing; EUV/photoresist demand; qualification wins
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 材料公司出货/价格、foundry utilization、WFE install base、客户认证进展、CIQ segment data
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度/季度，取决于材料披露频率
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 按 consumable frequency、qualification barrier、localization 和 raw-material pass-through 建模。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 材料收入通常滞后 WFE 安装和稼动率；国产替代可能牺牲 ASP/GM。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 先进封装利润池由 OSAT、foundry captive packaging 还是设备/材料捕获？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: CoWoS/2.5D capacity; HBM stack demand; OSAT utilization; packaging capex; substrate lead time; customer prepayment
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: TSMC/ASE/Amkor/PTI/JCET commentary、packaging equipment orders、substrate data、CIQ segment margins
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度供应链 + 季度 capex/utilization
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 拆 traditional OSAT 与 advanced packaging；用 utilization、capex ROI、客户预付款和 mix 建毛利。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 先进封装紧缺不等于所有 OSAT 受益；需验证 qualification 和客户分配。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: AI server/rack 的 ABF、PCB、low-loss material 内容量是否持续提升？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: ABF utilization; layer count; low-loss material mix; AI server share; substrate lead time; yield; customer concentration
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: PCB/substrate 月度收入、ODM build plan、AI accelerator/rack BOM、材料供应商 commentary、CIQ margins
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度供应链 + 季度毛利/mix
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 按 AI server share、layer count、material mix、yield 和 ASP erosion 建收入/GM sensitivity。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 单位增长可能被 ASP erosion 抵消；consumer PCB cycle 与 AI PCB 不能混看。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 800G/1.6T 需求能否抵消光模块 ASP erosion？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: 800G/1.6T awards; module ASP; laser yield; optical DSP content; hyperscaler concentration; telecom inventory
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 光模块公司月度收入、hyperscaler award、Arista/NVIDIA architecture、laser/DSP suppliers、CIQ revisions
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度收入 + 季度 award/margin
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 拆 module assembler、laser/component、DSP、contract manufacturing；单独建 port-speed migration 和 ASP curve。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 光模块高增长也可能低质量，如果价格下降快于速率/出货升级。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: AI server/ODM 收入增长能否转化为现金流和可持续毛利？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: AI server mix; rack-scale awards; backlog; working capital; customer concentration; gross margin; cash conversion
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 台湾 ODM 月度收入、hyperscaler capex、AI rack program、公司 margin/working capital、CIQ segment estimates
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度收入 + 季度现金流
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 用 pass-through revenue、engineering value-add、rack integration、NWC 和 customer concentration 建模型。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: ODM 收入大、毛利薄；AI server ramp 可能压 working capital 和现金流。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: AI power/cooling/connectors 是结构性增量，还是项目型 capex 高峰？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: data-center power backlog; liquid-cooling attach; rack power density; connector/cable content; fab project awards
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: industrial company backlog、data-center capex、rack BOM、liquid-cooling adoption、CIQ order/revenue revisions
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 季度 backlog + 重大项目事件
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 区分 product margin 与 project/turnkey margin；用 backlog conversion、content per rack 和 attach rate 建模。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 订单强不代表利润强，项目执行、交付节奏和成本 pass-through 是关键。

kpi_monitoring.decision_question: 被动元件/电子组件库存周期是否触底，高端 server/auto mix 是否提升？
kpi_monitoring.metrics: distributor inventory; MLCC/resistor pricing; utilization; auto/server mix; high-frequency component demand
kpi_monitoring.source_lane: 被动元件月度收入、渠道库存、auto/server build、公司 pricing/mix commentary、CIQ margins
kpi_monitoring.cadence: 月度收入/价格 + 季度库存
kpi_monitoring.model_link: 把 commodity consumer components 与 high-end auto/server components 分开建 ASP、utilization 和 GM。
kpi_monitoring.watchout: 渠道补库存容易制造假复苏；要看终端 sell-through 和价格纪律。

model_architecture.purpose: 从 end-market 需求反推半导体链条收入弹性。
model_architecture.inputs: Cloud capex、AI server/rack build、smartphone/PC units、auto/industrial production、telecom capex。
model_architecture.output: 每个 segment 的 demand beta、lead/lag 关系和订单质量判断。

model_architecture.purpose: 识别哪里是真正瓶颈，哪里只是价格或库存传导。
model_architecture.output: 约束链条、受益顺序、capex 拉动和反证信号。

model_architecture.purpose: 把行业驱动落到单公司 segment revenue / product mix。
model_architecture.inputs: CIQ segment data、公司 IR/filings、月度收入、客户/地域 split、产品 ASP/unit/mix。
model_architecture.output: FY0/FY1/FY2 revenue bridge、关键 driver sensitivity、bull/base/bear 情景。

model_architecture.purpose: 避免只看收入增长，解释毛利、折旧、working capital 和 FCF。
model_architecture.output: normalized margin、cycle margin、FCF conversion、ROIC/capex ROI 判断。

model_architecture.purpose: 根据商业模式选择估值锚，而非全行业统一倍数。
model_architecture.output: segment-specific comp set、估值区间、需要 CIQ 刷新的缺口。

model_architecture.purpose: 把 thesis 变成可日常监控的事件和数据。
model_architecture.inputs: earnings dates、product launches、capex updates、pricing data、export-control changes、monthly revenue。

analyst_glossary.definition: High Bandwidth Memory，高带宽 DRAM 堆叠，是 AI accelerator 的核心瓶颈之一。
TSMC 的 2.5D advanced packaging 平台，连接 GPU/ASIC、HBM 和 interposer。
高端封装基板，AI accelerator 和 high-end CPU/GPU 常用，供需会影响出货。
Serializer/Deserializer，高速串并转换 I/O，是 switch/ASIC/retimer 的关键模块。
重整高速信号的芯片，PCIe/CXL/高速互联中随速度升级提高 attach。
光模块中的数字信号处理芯片，决定高速光通信性能和 BOM 价值。
Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test，第三方封装测试厂。
Wafer Fab Equipment，晶圆制造设备，通常是半导体 capex 周期最直接传导层。
Process Design Kit，foundry 提供给设计公司的工艺设计套件。
芯片设计定稿并交付制造，是 EDA/IP 和 foundry 后续需求的领先信号。
产能利用率，foundry/OSAT/IDM 毛利弹性的核心变量。
Average Selling Price，平均售价；memory、optical、PCB 等环节尤其关键。
存储出货容量增长，用于分析 DRAM/NAND 供需而不只看单位出货。
订单/出货比，常用于设备、模拟、工业链条判断周期位置。
良率，先进制程、先进封装、光模块和 substrate 的核心利润变量。
Non-recurring engineering，一次性工程开发收入，ASIC 服务和 design services 常见。
宽禁带功率半导体材料，用于 EV、工业、电源和高效率功率转换。
高速互联标准，推动 retimer、switch、memory pooling 和 server connectivity。
Long-term agreement，长期供货/定价协议，材料、memory、foundry、substrate 都可能出现。
跨周期正常化盈利，适合 memory、foundry、WFE、analog 等周期行业估值。

debate_map.debate: AI capex 是长期平台迁移，还是被短期算力稀缺和融资环境放大的周期？
debate_map.consensus_view: AI infrastructure demand remains structurally strong and supply-constrained.
debate_map.variant_question: 如果训练 scaling law 或 enterprise ROI 放缓，GPU/HBM/optical/ODM 的订单可见度会先在哪一层破？
debate_map.segments: Compute/AI chips, HBM, foundry, advanced packaging, optical, EMS/ODM, power/cooling.
debate_map.winners_if_true: NVIDIA, Broadcom, AMD, Marvell, TSMC, SK hynix, Micron, Vertiv, Delta, Arista, Innolight, Quanta, Wiwynn.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: High-multiple AI supply-chain names with customer concentration, pass-through margin risk or late-cycle capacity additions.
debate_map.monitoring: Hyperscaler capex revisions, AI server backlog, GPU lead times, HBM contract pricing, power availability, cloud gross margin commentary.
debate_map.falsifier: Order pushouts across ODM/optical/substrate layers while GPU supply improves; cloud capex cuts without offsetting utilization data.

debate_map.debate: Custom ASIC 会不会显著削弱 GPU 经济池？
debate_map.consensus_view: GPU remains dominant for general-purpose training/inference, while custom ASIC expands total AI silicon TAM.
debate_map.variant_question: Hyperscaler workloads是否足够标准化，使ASIC在推理或内部训练中获得更大份额？
debate_map.segments: Compute/AI chips, ASIC services, EDA/IP, foundry, networking silicon.
debate_map.winners_if_true: Broadcom, Marvell, Alchip, GUC, TSMC, Synopsys, Cadence, Astera/Credo for connectivity.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: GPU-only exposure if software ecosystem and time-to-market advantages narrow.
debate_map.monitoring: ASIC tape-outs, NRE backlog, hyperscaler chip program disclosures, TSMC HPC mix, EDA/IP RPO, supply allocation.
debate_map.falsifier: ASIC ramps fail to reach volume or remain limited to narrow workloads; GPU software attach and inference share continue rising.

debate_map.debate: HBM 是 memory 新结构性利润池，还是高景气 DRAM 周期的另一种表现？
debate_map.consensus_view: HBM mix structurally improves memory margins and tightens commodity DRAM supply.
debate_map.variant_question: HBM capacity expansion会不会在 12-24 个月后形成新一轮供给过剩？
debate_map.segments: Memory, WFE, test, advanced packaging, substrates.
debate_map.winners_if_true: SK hynix, Micron, Samsung, Advantest, Hanmi Semiconductor, Lam, Applied Materials, DISCO, BESI.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Memory names if investors annualize peak ASP/margins; late entrants if qualification misses.
debate_map.monitoring: HBM qualification share, DRAM capex, contract ASP, memory inventory days, HBM test/stacking bottlenecks.
debate_map.falsifier: HBM pricing rolls over while capacity additions accelerate; commodity DRAM supply discipline breaks.

debate_map.debate: 先进封装/CoWoS 是独立利润池，还是 TSMC captive advantage 的延伸？
debate_map.consensus_view: Advanced packaging remains a bottleneck and captures more value in AI systems.
debate_map.variant_question: OSAT和设备/材料供应商能拿到多少经济价值，还是主要被foundry和GPU平台吸收？
debate_map.segments: OSAT, packaging equipment, substrate, process control/test, foundry.
debate_map.winners_if_true: TSMC, ASE, Amkor, BESI, ASMPT, Hanmi, Unimicron, Ibiden, Kinsus, TOWA, Technoprobe.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Traditional OSAT capacity with limited advanced-package qualification.
debate_map.monitoring: CoWoS capacity, HBM stack demand, substrate lead time, packaging equipment orders, OSAT capex/customer prepayments.
debate_map.falsifier: Advanced packaging capacity normalizes faster than expected; pricing or utilization weakens despite AI demand.

debate_map.debate: 中国半导体国产替代是可持续份额提升，还是政策驱动的局部过热？
debate_map.consensus_view: Localization remains a multi-year structural theme across equipment, materials, analog/RF/power and mature foundry.
debate_map.variant_question: 哪些环节真正形成技术/客户壁垒，哪些只是受益于补贴、进口替代和订单前置？
debate_map.segments: China WFE, materials, mature foundry, OSAT, analog/RF, power, PCB/optical.
debate_map.winners_if_true: NAURA, AMEC, Piotech, Anji, SMIC, Hua Hong, Will Semi, Maxscend, SG Micro, StarPower, JCET, Shennan, Innolight.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Global suppliers with high China mix; China names exposed to price competition and subsidy-led overcapacity.
debate_map.monitoring: Domestic tool qualification, China fab capex, gross margins, export-control updates, customer concentration, pricing trends.
debate_map.falsifier: Localization revenue grows but margins collapse; major tools/materials fail advanced-node qualification.

debate_map.debate: WFE 是否进入 AI/HBM 驱动的新上行周期？
debate_map.consensus_view: AI, HBM and leading-edge logic raise equipment intensity and extend WFE upcycle.
debate_map.variant_question: 当前订单中有多少是真实 multi-year demand，多少是 China pull-forward 或 memory catch-up？
debate_map.segments: WFE, process control, materials, foundry, memory.
debate_map.winners_if_true: ASML, AMAT, Lam, KLA, TEL, ASM International, Advantest, DISCO, Screen, Onto, Nova.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Equipment names if China/export-control pull-forward reverses or memory capex pauses.
debate_map.monitoring: SEMI/WFE forecasts, tool backlog, service revenue, customer capex, China mix, memory capex discipline.
debate_map.falsifier: Backlog converts poorly, orders roll over despite AI demand, or customers cut capex after pull-forward.

debate_map.debate: Optical / 800G / 1.6T 是长期AI网络瓶颈，还是模块价格快速商品化？
debate_map.consensus_view: AI scale-out requires faster optical links and supports 800G/1.6T growth.
debate_map.variant_question: 价值会留在DSP/laser/component，还是被模块组装和客户压价稀释？
debate_map.segments: Optical modules, lasers, optical DSP, networking silicon, PCB/materials.
debate_map.winners_if_true: Innolight, Eoptolink, Coherent, Lumentum, Fabrinet, Marvell, MACOM, Credo, Broadcom.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Module assemblers if ASP erosion outruns unit growth; telecom-exposed names if cloud strength masks carrier weakness.
debate_map.monitoring: 800G/1.6T awards, ASP erosion, laser yield, hyperscaler customer concentration, switch port-speed roadmaps.
debate_map.falsifier: Unit growth persists but revenue/margin underperform because pricing falls faster than expected.

debate_map.debate: AI value是否向 power / cooling / connectors 等 industrial layers 外溢？
debate_map.consensus_view: Data-center power density and rack-scale architecture raise non-chip content.
debate_map.variant_question: 这些工业链条是结构性长期受益，还是订单高峰后的项目型周期？
debate_map.segments: Adjacent infrastructure, EMS/ODM, substrate/PCB, analog/power, connectors/cables.
debate_map.winners_if_true: Vertiv, Eaton, Schneider, Delta, Amphenol, TE Connectivity, Luxshare, Lotes, BizLink, Auras, Lite-On.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Names with project-margin dilution, customer concentration or capacity built for temporary bottlenecks.
debate_map.monitoring: Liquid cooling attach, power density, utility constraints, backlog conversion, rack-level BOM, ODM customer awards.
debate_map.falsifier: Backlog grows but margins fall; project timing slips while chip supply normalizes.

debate_map.debate: 汽车/工业半导体去库存何时真正结束？
debate_map.consensus_view: Auto/industrial is bottoming after a long inventory correction, but recovery timing varies by product.
debate_map.variant_question: 哪些公司是真正 end-demand recovery，哪些只是 channel restock？
debate_map.segments: Analog, power, MCU, sensors, passives, specialty foundry.
debate_map.winners_if_true: NXP, Infineon, STMicro, Renesas, TI, ADI, ON Semi, MPS, ROHM, Melexis, X-FAB, Tower, Murata, Yageo.
debate_map.losers_or_risks: Auto/industrial names if distributors rebuild too early or EV growth slows further.
debate_map.monitoring: Distributor inventory, book-to-bill, auto production, EV inverter demand, industrial PMI, lead times.
debate_map.falsifier: Orders recover without sell-through; utilization remains weak and pricing pressure persists.

coverage_roadmap.question: Who belongs in the investable semi tech map and why?
coverage_roadmap.output: Segment taxonomy, priority classification, ticker normalization, dual-listing map.
coverage_roadmap.owner_action: Lock segment_id and priority before adding market data.

coverage_roadmap.question: Which facts are official, which are CIQ/consensus, and which are assumptions?
coverage_roadmap.output: CIQ export merge, source ledger, market-data as-of fields, unresolved source gaps.
coverage_roadmap.owner_action: Refresh Core companies first; do not publish valuation screens with needs_CIQ fields.

coverage_roadmap.question: What moves earnings revisions for each value-chain node?
coverage_roadmap.output: KPI dashboards by segment: WFE orders, memory ASP, foundry utilization, AI server rack BOM, optical port speed.
coverage_roadmap.owner_action: Build segment-specific drivers instead of a one-size-fits-all semi comp table.

coverage_roadmap.question: Which 100-150 companies deserve analyst time first?
coverage_roadmap.output: Core company tearsheets, source packs, thesis debates, model templates and comp groups.
coverage_roadmap.owner_action: Start with Core companies where segment profit pools and end-market leverage overlap.

coverage_roadmap.question: How do we know when the view changes?
coverage_roadmap.output: Catalyst calendar, earnings tracker, monthly data monitor, supply-chain signal log.
coverage_roadmap.owner_action: Tie each thesis to explicit falsifiers and high-frequency data points.

companies.business_description: EDA and semiconductor IP leader across design, verification, software security and silicon lifecycle.
companies.key_products: EDA tools, verification, IP, silicon lifecycle management
companies.cycle_sensitivity: 相对抗周期，但新设计启动、先进节点迁移和并购整合会影响增速。
companies.competition_context: 全球高度集中：Synopsys/Cadence/Siemens EDA主导；Arm/Rambus/CEVA/eMemory/Alchip/GUC等分层竞争。
companies.key_kpis: RPO/ARR, design starts, emulation capacity, IP royalty, tape-out wins, advanced-node exposure.
companies.model_drivers: Seat growth, token/cloud usage, maintenance renewal, IP royalties, hardware emulation backlog, design services NRE, China/export-control exposure.
companies.leading_indicators: Advanced-node tape-outs, hyperscaler ASIC programs, foundry PDK releases, RPO/remaining performance obligations, emulation lead times, hiring in chip design teams.
companies.valuation_anchor: Recurring revenue growth, RPO, FCF margin, IP royalty durability
companies.margin_profile: Very high software-like gross margin for EDA/IP; lower but still attractive for ASIC services
companies.ai_leverage: High through custom ASIC, accelerated design complexity and advanced-node verification
companies.key_debates: Ansys integration, AI-assisted EDA monetization, China/export controls
companies.why_analysts_should_care: Best read-through for design complexity and advanced-node activity.
companies.coverage_depth: Deep-dive first wave: build source pack, CIQ market data refresh, segment model and thesis/falsifier.
companies.coverage_priority_rationale: Core because Best read-through for design complexity and advanced-node activity. Main live debate: Ansys integration, AI-assisted EDA monetization, China/export controls
companies.next_research_step: Build peer table separating software-like EDA from IP royalty and design-service models; map each Core company to node complexity and AI/custom-silicon exposure.

companies.ai_leverage: Very high through CoWoS, HBM and 2.5D/3D packaging

companies.next_research_step: Separate traditional OSAT from advanced-packaging equipment and AI packaging capacity; watch capital intensity and customer concentration.
